title: Crispy Spicy Turkish Walnut Salad
description: A bright, dairy‑free salad bursting with toasted walnuts, a tangy pomegranate‑sumac dressing, and a hint of heat.
instructions: Preheat oven to 180°C (350°F). Arrange walnuts on a baking sheet, drizzle with olive oil, and toast 8‑10 minutes until golden, stirring halfway. Remove and let cool.
Whisk together pomegranate molasses, sumac, cumin, smoked paprika, red pepper flakes, salt, and black pepper until smooth.
In a large bowl, combine chopped romaine, halved cherry tomatoes, sliced red onion, parsley, and mint.
Add toasted walnuts to the salad mix.
Drizzle the dressing over the salad and toss gently to coat.
Taste and adjust seasoning or add a splash of lemon juice if desired.
Serve immediately on crisp lettuce plates for a fresh, crunchy bite.
Optionally garnish with extra whole walnuts or a sprinkle of smoked paprika for visual flair.
